title: ajuga lycopsiformis
intro: Ajuga lycopsiformis, also known as Chinese bugleweed or dragon's mouth, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Ajuga, native to China. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments, including fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Ajuga lycopsiformis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for medicinal use, and it is also used in some herbal supplements to support immune function and overall health.
